daily.creation_mode_evidence: The daily baseline is a fact relation with per-row mart_loaded_at spanning seven loads. It is not one homogeneous MV snapshot in the exported evidence.

weekly.mart_loaded_at_evidence_gap: The exported weekly baseline columns do not include mart_loaded_at, and the local imported weekly baseline has no load timestamp column.

commits_available_around_daily_loads.subject: feat: add dry-run incremental control gestion refresh helper
feat: add guarded incremental control gestion apply
fix: clarify incremental apply seed scope
fix: handle daily route out-of-scope flag as text
fix: normalize empty kpione2 numeric values
fix: resolve codex ro db url for incremental dry run
feat: add guarded incremental apply flags to loader

provenance_matrix.current_version: same exported DDL in local parity DB
provenance_matrix.evidence: DDL lines 875-901 define KPIONE2 precedence, useful_day, same_source_multimark, multisource_overlap, and raw_evidence_count.
provenance_matrix.impact: Does not explain the 23 counter differences; those match raw batch changes instead.

provenance_matrix.current_version: HEAD 2a7f59c, refresh helper with _cg_daily_stage and loader v17_9C2A
provenance_matrix.evidence: Daily mart_loaded_at has seven distinct values; git history shows refresh and loader changes during that window.
provenance_matrix.impact: Baseline daily is not a single current rebuild; exact provenance requires per-load build context.

provenance_matrix.baseline_version: per-grain winner from v_rr_frecuencia_base_resuelta_v2, not a single weekly batch
provenance_matrix.current_version: same current local view; C004 snapshot was a narrower experimental surface
provenance_matrix.evidence: Current resolved view includes 30 rows from route batch 11 plus 3298 from batch 12 for 2026-05-11, and 44 from batch 15 plus 3437 from batch 18 for 2026-06-01. C004 snapshot omitted most of those historical batch rows.
provenance_matrix.impact: Explains the 71 weekly missing keys from the staged C004 output.

provenance_matrix.baseline_version: fact_cg_out_weekly_v2 export, no row-level load timestamp
provenance_matrix.evidence: The script and exported DDL both aggregate route frequency with daily facts; however C004 used an experimental route snapshot, not WEEKLY_FREQ.
provenance_matrix.impact: Weekly staged parity failed primarily because the route surface was wrong; FUENTES differences are NULL/empty only.

provenance_matrix.baseline_version: KPIONE2 beats POWER_APP; KPIONE is audit-only
provenance_matrix.current_version: same precedence in DDL and current helper
provenance_matrix.evidence: All 56 daily residual keys have source pair KPIONE2 -> KPIONE2.
provenance_matrix.impact: Source precedence does not explain residual daily value differences.

provenance_matrix.baseline_version: DDL uses trim/upper normalization for route and client fields
provenance_matrix.current_version: same DDL observed, plus C004 local comparison casts values to text
provenance_matrix.evidence: No CLIENT_NORMALIZATION class was required for the 71 weekly missing keys; FUENTES semantic sets are equal after NULL/empty normalization.
provenance_matrix.impact: Normalization is not the primary residual cause, but parity comparison must normalize NULL/empty for source strings.

provenance_matrix.baseline_version: NULL for no weekly reported source
provenance_matrix.current_version: C004 staged builder produced empty string for the same no-source condition
provenance_matrix.evidence: 4048 direct diffs vanish under COALESCE(value, ''). Baseline is NULL and staged is empty string in all 4048 rows.
provenance_matrix.impact: Format/comparison noise only; no semantic source-set difference.

provenance_matrix.baseline_version: fact weekly values from baseline route/fact materialization
provenance_matrix.current_version: C004 staged values derived from experimental route snapshot
provenance_matrix.evidence: 123 common-key weekly diffs remain after FUENTES normalization; route/person/plan fields also differ.
provenance_matrix.impact: Secondary symptom of route surface mismatch, not a standalone source precedence issue.

classes.baseline_value_origin: materialized daily fact route/person fields from historical build context
classes.local_value_origin: current local route rows joined by C004 after_missing_key variant
classes.associated_code_version: route view DDL plus mixed daily fact materialization; exact deployed commit not proven
classes.possible_correction: Record and replay the exact route row lineage per daily key/week; do not infer from a single batch.

classes.local_value_origin: KPIONE2 raw batch 34 or later counts
classes.associated_code_version: daily precedence formula same; input snapshot differs
classes.possible_correction: Pin KPIONE2 snapshot by affected date/build context instead of using the latest accumulated snapshot.

classes.associated_code_version: daily precedence formula same; input snapshot differs

root_causes.evidence: For all 23 KPIONE2 counter keys, raw batch 33 matches baseline counts and batches 34-38 match local counts. Batch 34 adds exactly one row per affected key.
Across 33 route/person residual keys, local values have exact route-row matches in available historical route batches; baseline values have no exact 10/10 route-row match, with best scores 2-9.

classes.evidence: All 71 missing weekly keys exist in historical route rows and in the current resolved route view, but none exists in the C004 route snapshot used for staged weekly.

root_causes.evidence: The C004 snapshot forced a narrowed route surface. The current resolved view carries per-grain historical winners that C004 omitted.
The 30 missing keys are present in route batches 8-11, current resolved uses batch 11 for them, and C004 snapshot used only batch 12 for that week.
The 41 missing keys are present in route batch 15, current resolved keeps historical batch-15 winners for that subset, and C004 snapshot kept only 3 batch-15 overrides plus batch 17.

details.interpretation: No semantic source-set difference was found. Baseline stores NULL where C004 staged stores empty string.

evidence: v_rr_frecuencia_base_resuelta_v2 ranks route batch by effective_week_start, cod_rt, cliente_norm, loaded_at desc and ruta_batch_id desc.
For 2026-05-11 the current resolved view contains 30 rows from route batch 11 and 3298 from batch 12.
For 2026-06-01 the current resolved view contains 44 rows from route batch 15 and 3437 from batch 18.
The C004 experimental route snapshot contained only batch 12 for 2026-05-11 and a batch 15/17 subset for 2026-06-01.

next_recipe: Build an explicit build_context table that pins raw source batch lineage by affected date, including KPIONE2 batch 33 for the 23 daily counter residual keys and batch 31 for the recovered missing key.
Rebuild daily from the pinned raw lineage and compare before route changes.

Use the resolved per-grain route lineage from v_rr_frecuencia_base_resuelta_v2 as the technical implementation surface for the closed business rule, recording ruta_batch_id per week/cod_rt/cliente_norm.
Normalize NULL and empty string for FUENTES_REPORTADAS_SEMANA during parity comparison; no semantic source-set correction is required for those 4048 rows.
Rebuild weekly from pinned daily plus resolved route lineage, not from the C004 narrowed route snapshot.
Only run clean-room reproducibility after daily value parity and weekly key/value parity are both exact.
